{{Infobox artifact
| name = halfsilver
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[halfsilver Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Halfsilver is a rare, glittering metal that resembles ordinary silver embedded with bright, star-like mineral veins. While it is more brittle than standard silver, its primary characteristic is its ability to disrupt and [[shear]] through [[madra]] with extreme efficiency. Because of these properties, it is a highly valued material for [[Soulsmiths]] to use in creating specialized tools and weapons. It is also utilized in high-[[Security constructs{{!}}security constructs]], such as prison doors, [[chains]], and [[iron-and-crystal manacles{{!}}manacles]], to prevent practitioners from using their [[madra]] to escape. Beyond weaponry, halfsilver is used in various artifacts, including badges of rank and specialized tongs for handling immaterial [[madra]]. Although it is a valuable commodity that can be used for trade, its presence can draw unwanted attention due to its rarity.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] is a primary mineral output from the mines of [[Mount Venture]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] is a material that is more brittle than silver but has disruptive effects on [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[halfsilver{{!}}halfsilver dagger]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] brandishes a [[halfsilver{{!}}halfsilver dagger]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] is a rare metal that looks like stars stuck in silver.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] is a rare material.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] is used in the form of rectangular tokens or [[chips]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[ring]] is made of [[halfsilver]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] disperses [[madra]] when it contacts it.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] is a material found in veins within [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The cuffs [[Lindon]] is wearing contain [[halfsilver]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] represents the rank of [[Lord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[halfsilver{{!}}Halfsilver]] interferes with the orderly control of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
